app/api/api_v1/endpoints/families.py::cr.answer: The 32-byte key length is required by AES-256 encryption standard. This is a security requirement.

app/api/api_v1/endpoints/test.py::_get_f.answer: SEBI regulation requires 30-day cooling period for systematic withdrawal. This is a legal compliance requirement that cannot be overridden.

app/api/api_v1/endpoints/test.py::_filte.answer: Negative holdings should be displayed as 0 to avoid confusing users. This is a product decision, not a calculation error.

app/api/api_v1/endpoints/reports.py::dow.answer: Sort by absolute value descending so the largest positions appear first. This matches user expectations from the mobile app.
